{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Skysworn armor passive defenses
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn armor]] has passive [[scripts]] that weaken hostile [[madra]] and spiritual attacks.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
